description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent front porch supported by columns and a large attached double garage. The facade features multiple symmetrically arranged windows, including a row of four on the upper level and several on the lower level, providing ample natural light. The main entryway is centrally located and flanked by decorative columns, with a covered porch area that extends across much of the front. The roof is predominantly flat, with subtle parapet-like edges, giving the house a modern yet functional appearance. The exterior walls are smooth and uniform, likely finished in painted stucco or siding. The house sits on a broad driveway with a cutout area, possibly for landscaping or a garden feature.
description: A modern two-story suburban house with a flat roof, large double garage, and a columned front porch. The facade is marked by symmetrical windows and a spacious driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, columned porch, double garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage extension and minimal window presence on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with upper and lower windows, and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side porch steps and additional windows, as well as the driveway cutout.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with covered porch, decorative columns, and steps leading up to the entry
